patches.find: disagrees in sign with its claimed confirmation (1–2 nT positive), suggesting the value was adopted from literature without understanding the oscillating nature of the signal.
patches.replace: disagrees in sign with its claimed confirmation (1–2 nT positive) — the dome predicts a negative excursion (field weakening), but the observation shows a positive enhancement. The sign error is unexplained and unaddressed.
patches.rationale: Removes speculative editorial claim 'without understanding the oscillating nature of the signal' (ISS-982). The sign/magnitude mismatch is the real problem; attributing it to dome author's ignorance is unverifiable and opens attack surface. Replaced with factual description of the unreconciled discrepancy.
PROS-005 and PROS-007 registration_date needs updating from 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-06. This is a metadata field update, handled separately via script.
